heroDescription: A conversion-led learning ecosystem for an AI-supported coding bootcamp. I shaped the product story, information architecture and responsive interface across the landing page, learning paths, courses and an SEO tutorial hub.

overview.description: Ultracamp helps people learn web development from the ground up through guided practice and always-available AI feedback. Its five-template ecosystem moves users from discovery to a confident subscription decision.

projectGoal.description: Create a scalable, mobile-first journey that makes a technical curriculum feel approachable, demonstrates the learning experience before purchase and keeps the €19 offer visible without interrupting exploration.

fontAndColours.description: A near-black interface borrows the focus of a code editor, while vivid green is reserved for progress, price and primary actions. Inter keeps dense technical content calm and legible from large displays down to compact mobile cards.

challenge.description: Coding education is crowded with broad promises, hidden pricing and intimidating course outlines. Ultracamp needed to explain a substantial technical programme in seconds, then provide enough depth to earn trust—especially for visitors researching from a phone.
challenge.question: How might we remove technical uncertainty and make a learner feel ready to subscribe from the device already in their hand?

priorities.title: Clarify the offer
priorities.description: Place the outcome, audience and price in the opening journey instead of asking visitors to decode the proposition.

priorities.title: Prove the product
priorities.description: Show the AI-assisted editor, feedback and progress experience rather than relying on generic education imagery.

priorities.title: Control density
priorities.description: Break a complex curriculum into progressive layers that remain readable and actionable on mobile.

research.description: A focused EdTech scan mapped where prospective learners lose confidence: vague outcomes, curricula designed only for desktop and no tangible preview of the learning environment. The strongest opportunity was not more information, but better sequencing.

benchmark.note: The benchmark compares recurring interface patterns and positioning choices; it is a design-direction tool, not a commercial performance ranking.

persona.name: Javier Morales
persona.context: Javier is changing careers and learns in short sessions between work and commuting. Free tutorials have built curiosity, but fragmented resources make progress difficult to judge.
persona.quote: I do not need another list of videos. I need to know what to practise next and whether I am getting it right.
goals: Follow a visible path from fundamentals to employable projects
Practise on a phone or laptop without losing progress
Understand the total commitment before paying
frustrations: Course outlines that feel endless on mobile
Marketing claims without a product preview
Feedback that arrives after motivation has faded

insights.label: 01 · Confidence
insights.title: Proof beats promise
insights.description: A realistic editor and progress model communicates the value of AI tutoring faster than feature copy alone.

insights.label: 02 · Structure
insights.title: Depth should be earned
insights.description: Lead with the benefit, then reveal learning paths, modules and lesson detail as intent increases.

insights.label: 03 · Mobile
insights.title: Conversion must travel
insights.description: Price and next actions need to remain available without becoming a persistent obstruction to reading.

ideation.description: The concept became an intent-based ecosystem. Search visitors can enter through useful tutorial content while direct visitors begin with the product promise; both paths converge on a learning path, course detail and a clear plan decision.

flow.title: Discover
flow.description: Arrive through a tutorial or the main landing page.

flow.title: Validate
flow.description: See the learning model, editor and AI feedback in context.

flow.title: Explore
flow.description: Open a role-based learning path and scan its milestones.

flow.title: Commit
flow.description: Review course detail, workload and practical outcomes.

flow.title: Subscribe
flow.description: Choose a transparent monthly or annual plan.

decisions.label: Entry strategy
decisions.title: Two paths, one decision
decisions.description: SEO content and direct campaign traffic use different openings but share the same proof and subscription architecture.

decisions.label: Information model
decisions.title: Progressive disclosure
decisions.description: Benefits, paths, courses and lessons each hold the amount of detail appropriate to that level of intent.

decisions.label: Conversion
decisions.title: Contextual CTAs
decisions.description: Calls to action sit beside proof, curriculum and pricing instead of repeating as disconnected banners.

decisions.label: Content
decisions.title: Learning before selling
decisions.description: Tutorial pages deliver genuine value first, then connect the topic to a structured course route.

design.description: The visual system combines the precision of a development environment with the pace of a modern product landing page. Components were designed mobile-first, then expanded into a modular desktop grid without changing their hierarchy or purpose.

decisions.label: Hierarchy
decisions.title: Green means action
decisions.description: The accent is limited to primary actions, progress, feedback and price so every use carries meaning.

decisions.label: Components
decisions.title: One card, many contexts
decisions.description: A shared card grammar adapts to courses, tutorials, modules and pricing while preserving scanning behaviour.

decisions.label: Accessibility
decisions.title: Comfortable density
decisions.description: Contrast, tap targets and restrained line lengths keep technical material legible on compact screens.

decisions.label: Responsive
decisions.title: Reflow, do not shrink
decisions.description: Tables become summaries, grids become carousels or stacks and side panels become in-flow decisions on mobile.

applications.objective: Make a dense full-stack syllabus feel progressive and scannable at every breakpoint.
applications.solution: Milestones lead into collapsible modules with duration, status and a visible next step.
applications.outcome: A complex syllabus becomes scannable at every breakpoint.

applications.objective: Keep the €19 offer understandable and close to relevant product proof without interrupting learning content.
applications.solution: Monthly and annual choices share one compact card, reinforced beside relevant course content.
applications.outcome: Price remains clear without dominating the learning story.

applications.objective: Give organic readers a useful standalone article and a clear route into structured learning.
applications.solution: Reading progress, topic context and a related course prompt create a natural continuation.
applications.outcome: Organic discovery connects to the paid ecosystem.

testing.description: The high-fidelity prototype was reviewed through realistic tasks that covered first impression, curriculum scanning, tutorial reading and plan selection. The aim was to expose confidence gaps before handoff, not to manufacture launch metrics.
testing.method: Five task-based review scenarios were run across desktop and mobile prototypes, with emphasis on comprehension, navigation confidence and whether the next action remained discoverable.

findings.task: Explain the offer after the first screen
findings.observation: AI support was understood, but the practical nature of the programme needed stronger visual proof.
findings.decision: Move the interactive editor preview directly after the core proposition and name the feedback loop.

findings.task: Find what to learn after JavaScript basics
findings.observation: A flat course list made progression feel like catalogue browsing.
findings.decision: Introduce role-based learning paths with milestones before individual course pages.

findings.observation: A wide comparison table interrupted reading and hid the annual advantage.
findings.decision: Use stacked plan states with one visible recommendation and a compact mobile CTA.

finalDesign.description: The final experience balances immersion with control. Desktop layouts use generous space and modular grids; mobile layouts preserve the same hierarchy through concise cards, collapsible detail and conversion prompts that support rather than cover the content.

highlights.title: Product-led landing
highlights.description: The opening journey pairs a clear €19 proposition with evidence of practice, feedback and real project work.

highlights.title: Role-based paths
highlights.description: Learning paths translate a large catalogue into a sequence with milestones, skills and visible commitment.

highlights.title: SEO tutorial hub
highlights.description: Search-friendly cards and articles create low-friction entry points that remain connected to the product.

highlights.title: Responsive conversion
highlights.description: Navigation, pricing, FAQs and course summaries recompose around thumb reach and small-screen reading.

impact.description: The design delivers a coherent acquisition and learning story across five connected page types. Its impact is expressed through the scalable product system and the clarity built into the subscription journey.

metrics.label: Scalable ecosystem
metrics.description: Landing, learning path, course detail, tutorial hub and article share one visual and conversion system.

metrics.label: Connected acquisition
metrics.description: Direct and organic visitors can enter differently while converging on one clear learning decision.

metrics.label: Responsive consistency
metrics.description: Components preserve meaning from wide curriculum grids to compact mobile reading flows.

learnings.description: A persuasive education product does not simplify the subject; it makes the route through that complexity feel deliberate, visible and achievable.

items.title: Sequence creates confidence
items.description: The same information feels easier when each page answers the next question instead of trying to answer every question at once.

items.title: Real interfaces are the strongest proof
items.description: Showing practice, feedback and progress makes an abstract AI-learning promise tangible without exaggerated claims.

items.title: Mobile is an information test
items.description: Designing for a narrow screen exposed which content was essential, which could wait and where conversion genuinely belonged.

gallery.description: Final device mockups showing the responsive learning experience, practice environment, pricing model and progress feedback across desktop and mobile.
